description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every push to main and develop branches and on pull requests. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-22.04, ubuntu-24.04, macos-13, macos-14) with various combinations of clang++ versions, C++ standards, Python versions, and CastXML EPIC versions. For each matrix entry, check out the repository, set up Python, display the Python version, install Python libraries and test libraries, run pycodestyle, and run tests using pytest.
